description: Baby Doge Coin (BABYDOGE) emerged in 2021 as a Dogecoin-inspired memecoin built on viral memes, charity support, and massive community momentum. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 BABYDOGE gives original BEP-20 BABYDOGE holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Baby Doge Coin
